---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or feature for GPDB
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this feature should work and what commands or user interfaces (buttons, dropdowns, etc.) it should use.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here. Mention if this relates to an existing Cog (e.g. moderation, ticketing, leveling).
